'''wachumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coactor|coactor]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coactor|coactor]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wachumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæchimith|wæchimith]] || [[word:wæchimij|wæchimij]] || [[word:wæchimish|wæchimish]] || [[word:wæchimi|wæchimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachuchumuth|wachuchumuth]] || [[word:wachuchumuj|wachuchumuj]] || [[word:wachuchumush|wachuchumush]] || [[word:wachuchumu|wachuchumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachumuth|wachumuth]] || [[word:wachumuj|wachumuj]] || [[word:wachumush|wachumush]] || [[word:wachumu|wachumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachufmuth|wachufmuth]] || [[word:wachufmuj|wachufmuj]] || [[word:wachufmush|wachufmush]] || [[word:wachufmuf|wachufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wachumuthu|wachumuthu]] || [[word:wachumuju|wachumuju]] || [[word:wachumushu|wachumushu]] || [[word:wachumuku|wachumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wachumuth|wachumuth]] || [[word:wachumuj|wachumuj]] || [[word:wachumush|wachumush]] || [[word:wachumu|wachumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wachumuthul|wachumuthul]] || [[word:wachumujul|wachumujul]] || [[word:wachumushul|wachumushul]] || [[word:wachumukul|wachumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wachumuthuthu|wachumuthuthu]] || [[word:wachumujuju|wachumujuju]] || [[word:wachumushushu|wachumushushu]] || [[word:wachumuku|wachumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wachumuthun|wachumuthun]] || [[word:wachumujun|wachumujun]] || [[word:wachumushun|wachumushun]] || [[word:wachumukun|wachumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wachumuthuoro|wachumuthuoro]] || [[word:wachumujuoro|wachumujuoro]] || [[word:wachumushuoro|wachumushuoro]] || [[word:wachumukuoro|wachumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
